Interface BatchDao

public interface BatchDao
Room Data Access Object (DAO) for Batch entity operations.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    delete(Batch batch)
    Deletes a batch from the database.
    long
    insert(Batch batch)
    Inserts a single batch into the database.
    LiveData<Batch>
    select(long id)
    Retrieves a specific batch by ID as LiveData.
    LiveData<List<Batch>>
    selectAll()
    Retrieves all batches ordered by date set (descending) as LiveData.
    LiveData<List<BatchWithEggGroups>>
    selectAllWithGroups()
    Retrieves all batches with their associated egg groups as LiveData.
    LiveData<List<BatchWithIncubator>>
    selectAllWithIncubator()
    Retrieves all batches with incubator information as LiveData.
    LiveData<List<BatchWithIncubator>>
    selectAllWithIncubatorOrderByBatchNumber()
    Retrieves all batches with incubator information, ordered by batch number then date set.
    LiveData<List<BatchWithIncubator>>
    selectAllWithIncubatorOrderByExpectedHatch()
    Retrieves all batches with incubator information, ordered by expected hatch date (ascending).
    LiveData<List<BatchWithIncubator>>
    selectAllWithIncubatorOrderByIncubator()
    Retrieves all batches with incubator information, ordered by incubator name then date set.
    LiveData<List<Batch>>
    selectByIncubator(long incubatorId)
    Retrieves all batches for a specific incubator as LiveData.
    LiveData<BatchWithEggGroups>
    selectWithGroups(long id)
    Retrieves a specific batch with its associated egg groups as LiveData.
    void
    update(Batch batch)
    Updates an existing batch in the database.

  • Method Details

    • insert

      long insert(Batch batch)
      Inserts a single batch into the database.
      Parameters:
      batch - the batch to insert
      Returns:
      the generated batch ID

    • update

      void update(Batch batch)
      Updates an existing batch in the database.
      Parameters:
      batch - the batch to update

    • delete

      void delete(Batch batch)
      Deletes a batch from the database.
      Parameters:
      batch - the batch to delete

    • selectAll

      LiveData<List<Batch>> selectAll()
      Retrieves all batches ordered by date set (descending) as LiveData.
      Returns:
      a LiveData list of all batches

    • select

      LiveData<Batch> select(long id)
      Retrieves a specific batch by ID as LiveData.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the batch to retrieve
      Returns:
      a LiveData containing the batch with the specified ID

    • selectByIncubator

      LiveData<List<Batch>> selectByIncubator(long incubatorId)
      Retrieves all batches for a specific incubator as LiveData.
      Parameters:
      incubatorId - the ID of the incubator
      Returns:
      a LiveData list of batches for the specified incubator

    • selectWithGroups

      LiveData<BatchWithEggGroups> selectWithGroups(long id)
      Retrieves a specific batch with its associated egg groups as LiveData.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the batch to retrieve
      Returns:
      a LiveData containing the batch with its egg groups

    • selectAllWithGroups

      LiveData<List<BatchWithEggGroups>> selectAllWithGroups()
      Retrieves all batches with their associated egg groups as LiveData.
      Returns:
      a LiveData list of all batches with their egg groups

    • selectAllWithIncubator

      LiveData<List<BatchWithIncubator>> selectAllWithIncubator()
      Retrieves all batches with incubator information as LiveData.
      Returns:
      a LiveData list of all batches with incubator details

    • selectAllWithIncubatorOrderByExpectedHatch

      LiveData<List<BatchWithIncubator>> selectAllWithIncubatorOrderByExpectedHatch()
      Retrieves all batches with incubator information, ordered by expected hatch date (ascending).
      Returns:
      a LiveData list of all batches with incubator details, sorted by hatch date

    • selectAllWithIncubatorOrderByIncubator

      LiveData<List<BatchWithIncubator>> selectAllWithIncubatorOrderByIncubator()
      Retrieves all batches with incubator information, ordered by incubator name then date set.
      Returns:
      a LiveData list of all batches with incubator details, sorted by name then date

    • selectAllWithIncubatorOrderByBatchNumber

      LiveData<List<BatchWithIncubator>> selectAllWithIncubatorOrderByBatchNumber()
      Retrieves all batches with incubator information, ordered by batch number then date set.
      Returns:
      a LiveData list of all batches with incubator details, sorted by batch number
